## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what changes and why. -->

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Other

## Screenshots / screen recording

<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after light + dark. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew :toaststack:lintDebug :toaststack:testDebugUnitTest` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests where applicable
- [ ] Updated `README.md` and `CLAUDE.md` if the public API or scope changed
- [ ] Bumped the library version in `toaststack/build.gradle.kts` if the public API changed
- [ ] Kept library dependencies minimal (no new third-party SDK without justification)
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude` trailers on commits
